title: Herbal Tender Stout Soup
description: A quick-fix Irish dish featuring stout as the base with tender vegetables and herbs for a dash-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: 3 cups mixed leafy greens (e.g., spinach, kale)
1/4 cup fresh parsley, finely chopped (for garnish only)

instructions: Heat the stout in a pot over medium heat. Stir occasionally to prevent burning.
Add the diced carrots and celery to the pot, stir well to combine with the stout.
When everything is heated through and well combined, add the leafy greens.
Stir until the greens wilt slightly but remain tender. The cooking time for vegetables should be about 5 minutes total.
Remove from heat and let it sit for a minute before serving. Garnish with fresh parsley if desired.
Serve hot as a quick-fix lunch or snack.
